observations.axis: Seeking tangible power vs. seeking intangible source
observations.summary: Aviel urges the boy to seek answers from a power that can be physically touched, contrasting the boy's ongoing search for an intangible source.

left_evidence.quote: If you are still searching for your source, boy, pick up a stone and give it a name.

right_evidence.quote: Seek answers from a power you can touch.
